issues.current_text: a new `LongMap` with the same keys and values produced by applying `f` to each value
issues.problem: Slightly ambiguous phrasing—reads as if both keys and values are 'produced by applying `f`'. Cleaner parsing would make it explicit that only values are transformed.
issues.suggestion: a new `LongMap` with the same keys, where each value is the result of applying `f` to the corresponding value in this map

issues.current_text: a new `LongMap` pairing each key from `keys` with the value at the same position in `values`, stopping at the shorter iterator
issues.problem: Uses 'iterator' but the parameters are iterables; phrasing also differs slightly from the sibling Array overload's `@return` ('up to the shorter of the two'). Minor inconsistency.
issues.suggestion: a new `LongMap` pairing each key from `keys` with the value at the same position in `values`, up to the shorter of the two iterables
